title: Support display/scan %u/%z Issue: #2324
body: Initial attempt at 2324. 'u/z' flags for display and scan. Some prior implementation for these flags was already present in the display code. I don't believe that this implementation was correct and it has been replaced. 2-state logic is implemented as the packed byte stream representation, whereas the 4-stage logic is implemented as the word-alternating 0/1 and x/z representation as in t_vpi_vecval. Need to review endianness. Yet to verify this against the output of another simulator; probably Icarus when I have time.
